name: Maraschino Party Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/2 to 2/3 cups Egg whites (from 4 large eggs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a mixing bowl.
2. Add shortening, cherry juice, cherries, and milk. Mix on slow to medium speed for 2 minutes.
3. Gradually add egg whites and continue beating for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Pour the batter into greased baking pans and bake at 350°F (175°C) for 30 to 35 minutes.
5. Ice with a 7-minute icing and decorate with cherries once cooled.
